_publications._publicationTitle: The development of an artificial intelligence auto-segmentation tool for 3D volumetric analysis of vestibular schwannomas.

_contextSnippet: Project file Voxel size DICE POC DPP V1.0 Image 1 0.5 × 0.5 × 0.75 0.89 0.90 Image 2 0.5 × 0.5 × 0.9 0.90 0.93
details: Successfully used as input for AI auto-segmentation tool across 24 different images with varying voxel sizes ranging from 0.375×0.375×0.5 to 1.0×1.0×1.0
